sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42211" key="e)rgomi/shs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐργο-μίσης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who hates work,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0543.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:685" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.685</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
